    def test_count_zero_runs_indefinitely(self, run_pingu):
        """Test with count=0 runs indefinitely (must be interrupted)."""
        import subprocess
        import signal
        import time
        from pathlib import Path
    
        # Start with count=0
        exec_path = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "executable"
        proc = subprocess.Popen(
            [str(exec_path), "-c", "0", "127.0.0.1"],
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
            text=True,
        )
    
        # Wait a bit for it to start
        time.sleep(0.3)
    
        # Kill it
        proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT)
        stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=2)
    
        # Should have started and sent packets

        """Test with large count value (but don't wait for completion)."""

        from pathlib import Path
